title: /approve and /deny crash with Telegram 400: Unsupported start tag 'token'
source: Ash bug report 2026-07-04 — screenshot showing 400 Bad Request on /approve and /deny
current_state: Bot initialised with parse_mode='HTML' globally. handle_approvals sends plain-text messages (usage hint, token status, results) without overriding parse_mode. Usage hint 'Usage: /approve <token>' sent as HTML → Telegram rejects <token> as unsupported tag. Byte offsets match exactly: 16 for /approve, 13 for /deny.
target_state: All send_message calls in handle_approvals use parse_mode=None. None of those messages need HTML. Also protects result_text and exception strings from accidental HTML injection.
